quote: I took in an old radio that had been sitting in a corner of my garage since the 1980's. This radio was originally built in the 1930's and was damaged. They took the radio and made it like new! It now looks like something out of a Hollywood movie. I am so impressed with the detail of their work and you cannot see where any of the damage was and the finish and color are extraordinary.
author: Marc Entsminger

quote: ARED restored my long awaited settee given to me from my Grandfather so long ago and over the years had gotten into quite a disarray! The craftsmanship was impeccable, I was so excited to see the settee restored to its former glory, it's quite the masterpiece. This piece of furniture had so many memories and now I can hand it down to my children to create more.
author: Nancy Volkert

quote: I had an old dining table from my grandma restored by Arnold and his team. Wow I can't believe the craftsmanship of these guys. I will be back for sure.
author: Chris S

quote: They did a fantastic job remodeling an antique chair. The chair was over 150 years old, in my wife's family for generations, and in bad shape from years of neglect. They worked with me to get it just the way I wanted it using fabric I provided. I could not be happier. It was not cheap ($1200.00), but this was not something I could have done myself.
author: John Murray

quote: I was extremely impressed at how quick they got the job done. They have great skills!
author: Antonio Valentino

quote: Their work is so amazing. By far the best antique restorations in DFW.
author: Chase Green
